# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: d:/SDU/bachelor_project/iot_protocol/build
# It was generated by CMake: C:/Program Files/CMake/bin/cmake.exe
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Application Binary Directory
APPLICATION_BINARY_DIR:PATH=D:/SDU/bachelor_project/iot_protocol/build

//Application Source Directory
APPLICATION_SOURCE_DIR:PATH=D:/SDU/bachelor_project/iot_protocol

//Path to a program.
CCACHE_FOUND:FILEPATH=CCACHE_FOUND-NOTFOUND

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=Debug

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER:FILEPATH=C:/msys64/ucrt64/bin/g++.exe

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_C_COMPILER:FILEPATH=C:/msys64/ucrt64/bin/gcc.exe

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS:BOOL=TRUE

//Value Computed by CMake.
CMAKE_FIND_PACKAGE_REDIRECTS_DIR:STATIC=D:/SDU/bachelor_project/iot_protocol/build/CMakeFiles/pkgRedirects

//Path to a program.
Python3_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=C:/msys64/ucrt64/bin/python.exe

//Zephyr base
ZEPHYR_BASE:PATH=D:/SDU/bachelor_project/zephyr-workspace/zephyr

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for ZephyrAppConfiguration.
ZephyrAppConfiguration_DIR:PATH=ZephyrAppConfiguration_DIR-NOTFOUND

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for ZephyrBuildConfiguration.
ZephyrBuildConfiguration_DIR:PATH=ZephyrBuildConfiguration_DIR-NOTFOUND

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for Zephyr.
Zephyr_DIR:PATH=D:/SDU/bachelor_project/zephyr-workspace/zephyr/share/zephyr-package/cmake
